sentences.arabic: شَعَرَ كَرِيمٌ بِأَلَمٍ فِي رَأْسِهِ وَذَهَبَ إِلَى الطَّبِيبِ.
sentences.translation: Karim je osjetio bol u glavi i otišao je kod ljekara.
sentences.translationEn: Karim had a headache and went to the doctor.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ لَهُ الطَّبِيبُ أَنْ يَسْتَرِيحَ وَيَشْرَبَ كَثِيرًا مِنَ الْمَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Ljekar mu je rekao da se odmori i da pije puno vode.
sentences.translationEn: The doctor told him to rest and drink a lot of water.

sentences.arabic: كَتَبَ الطَّبِيبُ لَهُ وَصْفَةً لِدَوَاءٍ بَسِيطٍ.
sentences.translation: Ljekar mu je napisao recept za jednostavan lijek.
sentences.translationEn: The doctor wrote him a prescription for a simple medicine.

sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ كَرِيمٌ إِلَى الصَّيْدَلِيَّةِ وَاشْتَرَى الدَّوَاءَ.
sentences.translation: Karim je otišao u apoteku i kupio lijek.
sentences.translationEn: Karim went to the pharmacy and bought the medicine.

sentences.translation: Nakon dva dana osjetio se mnogo bolje.
sentences.translationEn: After two days he felt much better.
